S

SCROLLED - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.PreScrollingType
The scrolled scrolling type.
SEARCH - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"search": The name for the "Search..." text.
SEARCH_CUSTOM - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.globals.SearchOptions
The option for custom search categories.
SEARCH_ON_ANCHORS - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.globals.SearchOptions
The option for searching on articles and titles.
SEARCH_ON_ARTICLES - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.globals.SearchOptions
The option for searching only on articles.
SEARCH_ON_TITLES - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.globals.SearchOptions
The option for searching on articles and titles.
SearchOptions - Interface in org.docgene.model.globals
The Search options.
SEE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"see": The name for the "For ..., see" text.
SEEALSO - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.globals.Localization
"seealso": The name for the See Also chapter.
SentenceStyle - Class in org.docgene.api
Represents a sentence style.

setFixedLayout(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTable
Set if the table has a fixed layout.
setFixedLeftMenuOptions(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the options in the left menu are always present (meaning that all options are present even for the page on which we are).

Set if the options in the menu are always present.

setForkParser(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set true if the parsing should use a fork-join pool to perform the parsing
setForkParserSplit(int) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the number of files which should be used to split the parsing

Set if the glossary description was found.
setFullTextSearch(boolean, int) - Method in class org.docgene.api.DocGeneratorAPI
Configure the full text search.
setFullTextSearch(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if there is a full text search.
setFulltextSearch(FullTextSearch) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Set the full text search manager.
setFullTextSearchCompressionLevel(int) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the full text search compression level (default is 1, to have an average size).
setFullTextSearchDatabase(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the Full Text Search Database.
setFullTextSearchDatabaseScript(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the full text search search Database Script.
setFullTextSearchRemoveAccents(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the full text search remove accents.
setFullTextSearchScript(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the Full Text Search Script.
setFullTextSearchUseMetaphone(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the full text use the Metaphone algorithm.

Set if the index is the global index.
setGlossary(ArticlesGlossary) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Set the articles glossary.

Set if the code element has a background.
setHasBackground(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLPre
Set if the pre element has a background.
setHasCategories(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the wiki has categories.

Set if the article has image maps.

Set the size of the Thread pool used for checking http links.

Set the timeout for the background thread executor used for checking http links.

Set the index generation type.

Set if the article content is in a frame.

Set the element custom inline style.

Set the element custom inline style.

setInputFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticleCategory
Set the category input XML file.
setInputFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesCategories
Do nothing.

Set the dictionnary input XML file.

Set the element input XML file.

Set the article input XML file.
setInputFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set the article input XML file.

Set the article input XML file.

Set the article input XML file.
setInputFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
Set the article input XML file.
setInputFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRedirect
Set the article input XML file.
setInputsSubDirectories(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the inputs must be the sub-directories of the specified input files.
setInvisibleChars(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLPre
Set if the invisible char character is supported.
setJQueryScripts(File, File, File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the jQuery Scripts.
setJQueryUI(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the jQuery Scripts.

Set the justification of the elements.
setJustification(char) - Method in interface org.docgene.model.JustifiedElement
Set the justification of the element.
setJustification(char) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set the justification of the article.
setJustification(char) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLChapter
Set the justification of the element.
setJustification(char) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLDiv
Set the justification of the element.
setJustification(char) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLParagraph
Set the justification of the element.
setKeepCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.OpaqueArticle
Set if the article title should keep the title description case.
setKeepCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set if the article title should keep the title description case.
setKeepCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLChapter
Set if the chapter description should keep the title description case.
setKeepCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLDisambArticle
Set if the article title should keep the title description case.
setKeepCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRedirect
Set if the article title should keep the title description case.
setKeepCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTitle
Set if the title description should keep the title description case.
setKeepNumbering(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLInclude
Set if the titles numbering levels is kept.
setLang(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLWikipediaLink
Set the link lang.

Set the LeaderLine Script.

Set the header leftText.
setLevel(int) - Method in interface org.docgene.model.TitledElement
Set the title level.
setLevel(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTitle
Set the title level.
setLightbox(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if images have a lightbox effect.
setLightboxScript(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the Lightbox Script.
setLimit(int) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the maximum number of articles in the same directory.
setLineNumber(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.AbstractLink
Set the line number where the reference appear.
setLineNumber(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLCategoryReference
Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the line number where the reference appear.
setLineNumber(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLResource
Set the line number where the reference appear.

Set the articles from which there is a reference to this article.

setLinkFromArticles(SortedMap<String, XMLParentArticle>) - Method in interface org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle
Set the articles from which there is a reference to this article.

Set the articles from which there is a reference to this article.

Set the article links from XML file.
setLinksFromFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set the article links from XML file.
setLinksFromFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLDisambArticle
Set the article links from XML file.
setLinksFromFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLFallbackArticle
Do nothing.
setLinksFromFile(File) - Method in interface org.docgene.model.XMLParentArticle
Set the article links from XML file.
setLinksFromFile(File) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
Set the article links from XML file.

Set the localization.

Set the Localization for one of the built-in locale.
setLocalLinksOption(char) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the accept option for local links.
setLowerCase(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLReference
Set that the first character of the reference should be kept in lower case.
setMail(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLMailLink
Set the email.

setMeta(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle

Set the note.

Set if the notes have a corresponding tooltip.

Set the text length of the notes tooltips.
setNotesTwoColumns(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the notes layout is on two columns.
setNotesTwoColumns(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set if the notes layout is on two columns.

Set the word as being put on an existing anchor.

Set the OpenLayer Scripts.

Set the original article link.
setOtherText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLSeeAlsoHeading
Set the SeeAlso associated text for the destination article.
setOuputDir(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the output directory for the wiki.

Set the output directory.

setPadding(char) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTable
Set the padding of the table rows.
setPageRankIterations(int) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the PageRank algorithm number of iterations, used for the PageRankOptions.PAGERANK_FIXED_ITERATIONS type.
setPageRankMaxIterations(int) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the PageRank algorithm maximum number of iterations, used for the PageRankOptions.PAGERANK_CONVERGE_ITERATIONS type.
setPageRanks(PageRanks) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Set the computed PageRanks.
setPageRankSearch(char) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the PageRank algorithm option.
setPageRankSearchConvergeDelta(double) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the delta value for the PageRank algorithm convergences, used for the PageRankOptions.PAGERANK_CONVERGE_ITERATIONS type.

setPreHasBackground(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set true if the "pre" elements have a background.
setPreScrollingType(char) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the default scrolling type.
setPreventExitType(char) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set how the program must exit.
setPreviousTitleIndex(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLInclude
Set the index of the title or chapter preceding the include element (0 means that there is no title or chapter before the include element).

Set the map projection.
setPublisher(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLCitation
Set the link reference publisher.

Set the reason of the TODO.
setReason(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTodo
Set the reason of the TODO.
setReferTo(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLIndex
Set the article id on which the index is referring to.

setRefID(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRedirect
Set the referenced article ID.

Set the relative path of the article XML file, from the associated root.

setRelaxSyntax(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set if the syntax of the articles is relaxed.

Set the search type.

Set if the UI has a Search box.

setSearchScript(File) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the Search Script.
setSearchType(short) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration

Set the title sequence id.

Set if warnings should be presented.

Set the simple representation of the member.

Set the specified size of the font.

Set the specified named size of the font.

Set the size of the text.

Set the HTML named size of the text.

setSize(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTextStyle
Set the size of the text.
setSortable(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTable
Set if the table has arrows to sort columns by their content.
setStartItem(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLList
Set the start item of an ordered (ol) list.

Set the timeout for static maps.

Set the style class of the reference.

Set the style class of the element.

Set the articles StyleSheet theme.

Set the StyleSheet theme file.

Set the article name suffix.

Set if the parser supports escaping characters in the content of XML articles.

Set the pre syntax.
setSyntaxType(short) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle

Set the table header.

Set if this article is a template.

Set the link description text.
setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLAnchor

setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLCitation
Set the link text.

setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLFooter
Set the footer text.
setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLMailLink
Set the mail description text.

Set the SeeAlso associated text
setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLSentence
Set the text.
setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLSpan
Set the text.
setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTodo
Set the text of the TODO.
setText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLWord
Set the text.
setThematicBreak(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLAPIDoc
Set if the api has thematic breaks("hr").
setThematicBreak(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLIncludedAPI
Set if the api has thematic breaks("hr").
setThematicBreak(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTitle
Set if the title has a thematic break ("hr") before the title.
setThisText(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLSeeAlsoHeading
Set the SeeAlso associated text for the origin article.
setTimeOuts(TimeOuts) - Method in class org.docgene.main.Configuration
Set the list of URLs with specific timeouts.

Set the XML file specifying the URLs TimeOuts.

setTitle(String) - Method in interface org.docgene.model.TitledElement
Set the title.

Set the title.
setTitle(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTitle
Set the title.
setTitledElementsList(List<TitledElement>) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set the ordered list of titled elements (chapters or titles).
setTOC(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Set if the article should have a Table of content.
setTopBorderType(short) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTableRow
Set the top border type.
setTrimLeft(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLPre
Set if the text must be trimmed to the left.
setTrimmedLeftLength(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLPre
Set the length of the spaces before the pre on the same line.
setType(int) - Method in class org.docgene.api.SentenceStyle
Set the specified type of the font.
setType(int) - Method in class org.docgene.model.AbstractStylableText
Set the font type of the text.
setType(String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLAudio
Set the audio type.

Return true if errors on an element must be emitted.

Set if the full paths of files should be presented for errors.

Show the parsing or consistency exceptions.

Set if the glossary errors are checked.

Return true if a package must be included in the wiki output.

Return true if unresolved images between between two packages must emit an error.

showUnresolvedReferences(String, String) - Method in class org.docgene.model.globals.ArticlesModel
Return true if unresolved references between between two packages must emit an error.
